question.question_text: How many total points will be scored in the NBA game between New Orleans Pelicans and Detroit Pistons on 2026-03-26?
question.context: New Orleans Pelicans (25-48) at Detroit Pistons (52-19). Regular season NBA game.

prediction.reasoning: NBA games in 2025-26 typically average around 110-115 points per team, giving a combined total near 225-230 points. The Pelicans (25-48) are a below-average offensive team this season, while the Pistons (52-19) are a strong team likely playing with pace and efficiency. Detroit's home games tend to be competitive and moderately paced. Considering both teams' offensive and defensive ratings, a total around 228 points seems reasonable. The Pelicans' struggles may mean they score fewer points, keeping the total from going too high. Confidence intervals are widened to account for game-to-game variance in NBA scoring, which typically has a standard deviation of roughly 12-15 total points.
